git_context.head: 4fba7a247a6604e16dd5e0d68fa86289f5d49b55
git_context.subject: Post-build audit Content Draft Runtime Governance Core

validation_domains.acceptance: All consumed evidence resolves, hashes match, and no missing audit artifact exists.
validation_domains.name: Build chain and evidence integrity
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm post-build audit, build, source/test hashes, manifests and seals are consumable and consistent.

validation_domains.acceptance: Safe preview-only requests pass and all incomplete/unsafe requests fail closed.
validation_domains.name: Runtime request contract validation
validation_domains.purpose: Validate required request fields, mode restrictions, evidence refs, traceability refs, human review and maturity level.

validation_domains.acceptance: No decision/output path can claim productive activity.
validation_domains.name: Runtime decision and output hard-false guarantees
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm every decision/output preserves productive hard-false flags.

validation_domains.acceptance: Preview remains conceptual, non-final, non-publishable, non-queueable and human-review required.
validation_domains.name: Preview non-publishability
validation_domains.purpose: Block final/publishable content markers in preview text.

validation_domains.acceptance: All no-side-effect fields remain false and mutation_surface remains empty for valid paths.
validation_domains.name: No-side-effect runtime contract
validation_domains.purpose: Guarantee no mutation surface, external calls, queue/publication mutation, asset generation or automation.

validation_domains.acceptance: No runtime state opens productive permissions.
validation_domains.name: Permission matrix and runtime states
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm every runtime state blocks draft/content/queue/publish/automation.

validation_domains.acceptance: Runtime governance remains evidence-bound and traceability-bound.
validation_domains.name: Evidence and traceability contracts
validation_domains.purpose: Validate runtime evidence refs and traceability refs requirements.

validation_domains.acceptance: Human authorization cannot bypass productive blocks.
validation_domains.name: Human review contract
validation_domains.purpose: Ensure human review is always required and cannot execute productive actions at this layer.

validation_domains.acceptance: Runtime requests cannot mix domain/campaign/brand context.
validation_domains.name: Domain isolation contract
validation_domains.purpose: Prevent cross-domain, brand voice and campaign context contamination.

validation_domains.acceptance: Content Engine remains independent and ARGOS integration remains status-only.
validation_domains.name: ARGOS boundary contract
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm ARGOS remains metadata-only, not required, no cross-imports, no bridge build and no cascade failure.

validation_domains.acceptance: No autonomy escalation and all unsafe paths return FAILED_BLOCKED.
validation_domains.name: Maturity and failure policy
validation_domains.purpose: Ensure autonomy level remains 0, escalation blocked, unsafe paths fail closed.

validation_domains.acceptance: Runtime audit artifacts are evidence-ready and non-productive.
validation_domains.name: Audit bundle and manifest/seal readiness
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm audit bundle requires canonical JSON, sha256, manifest, seal and has no productive effect claims.

validation_domains.acceptance: No source token can trigger external IO, automation, queue/publication, or protected root mutation.
validation_domains.name: Static security and forbidden operations
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm source contains no forbidden external IO/productive mutation tokens.

validation_domains.acceptance: Validation remains stable on Windows and does not reuse locked user temp.
validation_domains.name: Regression and suite stability
validation_domains.purpose: Reconfirm py_compile, targeted tests and content_engine suite using repo-local basetemp.

validation_domains.acceptance: Validation map and future validation remain non-productive and no-touch.
validation_domains.name: No-touch and no-mutation validation boundary
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm validation map defines no source/test/runtime/protected-root mutation.
